title: Pack list with previews
description: Browse curated packs with thumbnail previews, tags, star counts, and Hang & Apply. Search and filter by SMP, CPVP, ElyPVP, Applied, and more.

title: Texture Builder
description: Pick a CIT item (swords, GUI, potions, items), browse overrides from active packs with live previews, then Build & Apply to weave a custom pack.

title: Custom items in-game
description: Applied packs change armor, bows, tools, and items in multiplayer — custom textures visible on item frames and in your hotbar.

title: Slothy mascot
description: Slothy's Tree branding — the sloth icon used in the mod menu and on Modrinth.
